task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into FreeMED.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or main interface is visible in the web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the chart for patient Tracey Crona.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the patient record, summary, or dashboard specifically for 'Tracey Crona' or Patient ID '15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the vital signs entry form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, module, or dialog box specifically for adding or editing vital signs is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct vital signs are entered into the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields contain the target values: Blood Pressure 119/73 (or Systolic 119, Diastolic 73), Heart Rate 70, Temperature 98.4, Weight 160, and Height 61. The encounter date should be set to 2025-05-10.

task_completion.description: Verify the vital signs were saved for the correct encounter date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message, updated patient chart, or vitals history table showing the newly entered vitals associated with the date '2025-05-10'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the FreeMED web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is using a web browser to navigate FreeMED, rather than using terminal commands, scripts, or direct database queries to insert the records.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered data into the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is typed into the standard FreeMED input fields, not a text editor, and there is no evidence of HTML DOM manipulation via browser developer tools to fake the visual state.

integrity.description: Verify the vitals are being added to the correct patient.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient name 'Tracey Crona' or ID '15' is clearly visible in the context of the vitals entry form or the saved record, ensuring it wasn't added to a random patient.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Tracey Crona (ID: 15, DOB: 1981-07-02). Target Encounter Date: 2025-05-10. Target Vitals to verify: Blood Pressure 119/73 mmHg, Heart Rate 70 bpm, Temperature 98.4°F, Weight 160 lbs, Height 61 inches.
